nodes.label: AI as rough draft transcription tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI usually fits into my workday in the context of transcribing content

nodes.label: AI transcription accuracy for technical terms
nodes.label_negative: AI transcription inaccuracy for general speech
nodes.grounding_span: it does a better job at understanding technical jargon

nodes.label: AI adherence to transcription style guidelines
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from required style (e.g., including fillers, incorrect punctuation)
nodes.grounding_span: transcribes every single word which does not align with my job's constraints

nodes.label: AI speaker differentiation capability
nodes.grounding_span: AI has trouble distinguishing different speakers

nodes.label: Workplace-sanctioned AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My workplace discourages using AI because they think humans are better

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for difficult audio
nodes.grounding_span: It saved me a lot of time than if I had transcribed the rough draft myself

nodes.label: Career resilience against AI automation
nodes.grounding_span: I have thought about avoiding certain careers where AI will likely take over

nodes.label: Professional quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I always edit because AI has trouble distinguishing different speakers

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saved me a lot of time

nodes.label: Job security and career stability
nodes.grounding_span: it will not be replaced by AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for technical transcription
nodes.grounding_span: I felt very satisfied that it saved me hours of work

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on AI due to imperfections
nodes.grounding_span: AI transcription is far from perfect, so I don't rely on it too much

nodes.label: Compliance with workplace AI discouragement
nodes.grounding_span: I try to use AI only if I need it because my workplace does not encourage the use of AI

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I envision that my use of AI will increase as AI gets better and more sophisticated

nodes.label: Adaptive workflow switching based on task difficulty
nodes.grounding_span: When there is fuzzy audio or the speaker uses a lot of technical/medical terms, then I will start with the AI draft first

nodes.label: Strategic career planning considering AI impact
nodes.grounding_span: I have steered myself towards considering other careers that will always need humans
